fields.name: packet_type
fields.note: body[4] == 40 REALTIME_DATA. 159 frames decoded in Plan 04 (decode_biometrics_5.py)

fields.name: seq
fields.note: monotonic sequence

fields.name: subseq
fields.note: body[6] is a per-frame SUB-SEQUENCE counter (41-243 monotonic), NOT a CommandNumber for this stream (Plan 04 empirical finding)

fields.name: device_timestamp
fields.note: device-epoch u32 at payload[1:5] == body[8:12] (Plan 04 empirical reconciliation). epoch=device.

fields.name: heart_rate
fields.note: bpm. HR @ payload[5] == body[12] (EMPIRICALLY reconciled — the literal 4.0 offset decodes to all-zero/0x01 on 5.0). Smooth physiological series 84-131 bpm, mean 102, across 159 frames. PROTO-07 VERIFIED. Cross-validated by standard 0x2A37 parse_hr (D-08 substitute: RR<->HR self-consistency 8/8).

fields.name: rr_count
fields.note: number of RR intervals following. rr_count @ payload[6] == body[13] (Plan 04)

fields.name: rr_interval
fields.note: RR interval(s) in ms, uint16-LE, repeated rr_count times from payload[7:] == body[14:]. 8/8 RR-bearing frames self-consistent with 60000/HR (e.g. HR=91 -> RR 645-694 ms). PROTO-07 VERIFIED.
